category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the command-line interface for the Phylum API; Phylum official docs at https://docs.phylum.io/ describe software supply chain risk analysis.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is phylum-cli; official GitHub repository https://github.com/phylum-dev/cli titles it as the Phylum command line interface.
docs_sources: Official Phylum documentation includes CLI quickstart and phylum command reference pages under docs.phylum.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/phylum-dev/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a CLI for the Phylum API; official docs describe submitting dependency manifests for analysis.
